text.title: Supabase Backup and Restore Drill Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Supabase Backup and Restore Drill.

example.scenario: Quarterly drill for a Supabase project storing 250k rows across 12 tables.
example.trace: verify-snapshot → prepare-clone (faion-restore-clone, empty) → restore (412s) → validate (delta=0, checksum=true) → record
